title: erythroxylum plowmanii
intro: Erythroxylum plowmanii is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the Plowman's coca or Plowman's coca tree. This plant is a close relative of the coca plant (Erythroxylum coca) and is native to the Andes mountains in South America. The medicinal properties of Erythroxylum plowmanii include its ability to act as a local anesthetic and to have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include its use in traditional medicine to alleviate headaches, fatigue, and respiratory issues, with herbal preparations often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption.
